outbound_official_links.text: Labor Negotiations Solano County is committed to transparent labor negotiations and open communication with employees and the public. As negotiations progress, periodic updates will be posted below to provide timely information and support fair, collaborative agreements that balance employee needs with responsible public service delivery.

Alert Solano Alert Solano is Solano County’s public outreach campaign for the emergency notification system that quickly sends alerts via phone, email, or text during critical events such as natural disasters, evacuations, or public safety threats. Residents are encouraged to sign up to stay informed and receive timely, life-saving information. The emergency notification system includes texts, email, phone calls, social media, Hi-Lo sirens, local radio, and neighbor-to-neighbor.

Solano County Annual Reports Solano County's annual reports inform the residents of the accomplishments of the past year, including a comprehensive overview of the County's financial performance and strategic progress over the past year. Our Annual Report also builds transparency and trust by clearly communicating achievements, challenges, and future plans.
